title: Lyann Danielak
content:
People.ContactEmail ldanielak@mccarthy.ca
- British Columbia, 2023
- University of Windsor
- University of Calgary
Lyann Danielak is an associate in the Labour and Employment Group in Vancouver. She provides thoughtful and strategic advice to employers on a range of legal obligations, including employment standards, human rights, labour law, occupational health and safety, and workers’ compensation.
Lyann has appeared before, or assisted with matters in, the British Columbia Provincial Court and Supreme Court, as well as before administrative bodies such as the British Columbia Human Rights Tribunal, Labour Relations Board, and WorkSafeBC. She regularly helps clients stay current with developments in Canadian employment and labour legislation, and has significant experience resolving wrongful dismissal claims as well as labour and employment-related administrative proceedings.
Lyann advises local and international clients across a variety of industries, including mining, construction, retail, banking, and technology.
Recent highlights of Lyann’s experience include:
- Representing a multinational retailer in a prohibited action complaint before WorkSafeBC and successfully obtaining dismissal of the complaint;
- Providing strategic direction and litigation support to employers in industries such as retail and mining during restructuring and group terminations;
- Advising the seller on employment-related matters in the sale of a real estate business;
- Advising the purchaser on labour-related issues in a series of acquisitions of casino businesses;
- Participating in a national deal team and advising on British Columbia employment law in a $3.5 billion acquisition by a public issuer;
- Participating in a national deal team and advising on British Columbia employment law in the acquisition of an aviation business; and
- Acting as pro bono counsel for various charitable organizations in employment and human rights matters.
Lyann received her J.D. from the University of Windsor in 2022 and was called to the British Columbia bar in 2023. Lyann is a member of the Law Society of British Columbia, the Canadian Bar Association, and the Vancouver Bar Association. Before joining McCarthy Tétrault, Lyann completed her articles and worked as an associate at a large national firm in Vancouver.
